description: Alert when room sensors differ significantly from thermostat

variables.master_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_mbr_temperature") | float(0) - downstairs_thermo) | abs if states("sensor.temp_sensor_mbr_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.office_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_office_temperature") | float(0) - downstairs_thermo) | abs if states("sensor.temp_sensor_office_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.den_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_den_temperature") | float(0) - downstairs_thermo) | abs if states("sensor.temp_sensor_den_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.living_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_lr_temperature") | float(0) - downstairs_thermo) | abs if states("sensor.temp_sensor_lr_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.lauras_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_laura_temperature") | float(0) - upstairs_thermo) | abs if states("sensor.temp_sensor_laura_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.jamies_diff: {{ (states("sensor.temp_sensor_jamie_temperature") | float(0) - upstairs_thermo) | abs if jamie_home and states("sensor.temp_sensor_jamie_temperature") not in ["unavailable", "unknown"] else 0 }}
variables.has_alert: {{ master_diff > threshold or office_diff > threshold or den_diff > threshold or living_diff > threshold or lauras_diff > threshold or jamies_diff > threshold }}

data.title: HVAC Temperature Alert
data.message: Room temperature differs >{{ threshold }}°F from thermostat: {% if master_diff > threshold %}Master Bedroom: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_mbr_temperature") }}°F ({{ master_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}{% if office_diff > threshold %}Office: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_office_temperature") }}°F ({{ office_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}{% if den_diff > threshold %}Den: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_den_temperature") }}°F ({{ den_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}{% if living_diff > threshold %}Living Room: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_lr_temperature") }}°F ({{ living_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}{% if lauras_diff > threshold %}Laura's Room: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_laura_temperature") }}°F ({{ lauras_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}{% if jamies_diff > threshold %}Jamie's Room: {{ states("sensor.temp_sensor_jamie_temperature") }}°F ({{ jamies_diff | round(1) }}°F diff) {% endif %}
